description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a mix of pastel-colored exterior walls. The house includes multiple rooms, large windows, and two distinct outdoor pool areas—one with a freeform shape and another rectangular pool adjacent to a patio with lounge chairs. The property is landscaped with several purple-leaved trees and a row of surfboards or similar vertical elements near the pool. The rear facade has a series of large windows and sliding doors opening onto the pool and patio area, while the front is more enclosed with smaller windows and a central entryway. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a contemporary, functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roof, pastel walls, large windows, and two outdoor pools surrounded by trees and lounge areas.
description_view_0: Rear view showing large windows, sliding doors, two pools, patio furniture, and landscaping with purple trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow exterior wall, surfboards, and the arrangement of rooms and pools.
description_view_2: Front and side view with pastel yellow and purple walls, smaller windows, and a more enclosed facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black exterior, room layout, and additional purple trees and surfboards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding doors at the rear, smaller windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or overhang
